new_javadoc: /** * Sets the field as accessible by calling {@link AccessibleObject#setAccessible(boolean) AccessibleObject#setAccessible(true)} but only if a field * is not already accessible. * * @param field The field to set, may be null. * @return true if the field is accessible, false otherwise. * @throws SecurityException Thrown if {@code forceAccessible} flag is true and the request is denied. * @see AccessibleObject#setAccessible(boolean) * @see SecurityManager#checkPermission */
commit_message:
[LANG-1825] EqualsBuilder.reflectionAppend tries to set visibility on (#1647)

excluded fields

Don't force fields to be accessible when excluded.
